hooks.command: if echo '%claude_tool_input%' | grep -q 'backend/' 2>/dev/null; then cd C:/my-Project/Vidya_AI/VidyaAI/backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi
if echo '%claude_tool_input%' | grep -q 'frontend/' 2>/dev/null; then cd C:/my-Project/Vidya_AI/VidyaAI/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi

echo '---' && echo 'Session complete. Next steps:' && echo '1. Run: git status' && echo '2. Run: git add -p' && echo '3. Run: git commit -m "feat(...): ..."' && echo '4. Run: git push origin <branch-name>' && echo '---'
